examples: Ms Munro comes from southern Ontario, an area of considerable psychic murkiness and oddity.
Nobody has shown them how much excess or murkiness has crept into their style and how it obstructs what they are trying to say.
The stars grew fainter and the sky, shrouded by a murkiness that could have been clouds or mist, seemed much higher than before.
Though most of the journey moves with this sense of murkiness, there's variation in the marsh.
And depending on the murkiness of the situation, that can be more or less complicated.
